titleEn: Amanda Irwin promoted to Mountaire Farms CEO
titleZh: Mountaire Farms任命Amanda Irwin为首席执行官
summaryZh: Mountaire Farms宣布Amanda Irwin晋升为总裁兼首席执行官。该新闻主要涉及公司高层人事变动，未提及任何与智慧畜牧相关的技术、IoT、AI、自动化或传感器应用内容。对于关注养殖业技术创新的读者而言，该信息缺乏直接的技术或实践参考价值。
featuredReason: 该新闻仅涉及传统家禽企业的高层人事调整，与智慧畜牧的核心技术领域（IoT、AI、自动化等）无直接关联，不建议作为智慧畜牧行业重点阅读内容。
contentHtml:
MILLSBORO, Del. — Mountaire Farms recently announced that Amanda Irwin has been promoted to the title of president and CEO. Irwin was announced as the company’s president as of Jan. […]
The post Amanda Irwin promoted to Mountaire Farms CEO first appeared on poultrytimes.com.
